title: carex × squamigera
intro: Carex × squamigera, also known as the hairy-leaved sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Carex × squamigera include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
